name: Hochrippe Und Sauerkraut (Spareribs and Sauerk
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the sauerkraut.
2. Place sauerkraut in a large 4-quart casserole dish.
3. Add 2 quarts hot water to the casserole dish.
4. Add uncooked spareribs, paprika, bouillon cubes, caraway seeds, and pepper.
5. Cook covered over low heat for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Fry floured bacon slices until crispy.
7. Break the fried bacon into pieces and add to the sauerkraut mixture.
8. Remove bones from the sauce before serving.
9. Serve with dark bread and steins of beer.
